# Workshop

> Workshop is a creative collaboration network. Artists and creators drop into live five-seat Workshops with shared tools, post Collabs (casting briefs) to recruit collaborators, ship finished Works to a public portfolio, and gather in Groups around cities and crafts. Everything public is readable without an account.

Workshop's primitives are designed to be findable, shareable, and indexable by both search engines and AI agents. You don't need an account to read, share, or even apply / RSVP — account creation happens after value is delivered.

## Primitives

- **Works** — published creative output (films, music, design, writing) credited to one or more makers. Each Work has its own public page with `CreativeWork` JSON-LD.
- **Collabs** — open casting briefs: a project description with one or more open roles. Each Collab has its own page with `JobPosting` JSON-LD and is discoverable in Google Jobs.
- **Workshops** — live, five-seat collaborative rooms (critique, jam, hackathon, office hours, work-alongside). Each scheduled Workshop has its own page with `Event` JSON-LD.
- **Profiles** — public talent pages with credits, Works, Collabs, and city. Each Profile has its own page with `Person` JSON-LD.
- **Groups** — community spaces (city scenes, craft communities). Each Group has its own page with member-curated Events, Works, and Collabs.
- **Cities** — geographic hubs aggregating standing meetups, upcoming events, and open Collabs by location.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Workshop is and what's happening now.
- [Work](/gallery): Public feed of every Work people have shipped.
- [Collab Board](/collab): Open casting briefs — projects looking for collaborators.
- [Workshops](/workshops): Live and upcoming five-seat collaboration rooms.
- [Groups](/groups): Community spaces by city and craft.
- [Cities](/cities): Local Workshop scenes, meetups, and creators by city.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free plan and Workshop Plus.
- [Refer](/refer): Invite friends and earn credit.

## URL patterns

- Work detail: `/works/{slug}`
- Collab detail: `/collab/{slug}`
- Workshop detail: `/workshops/{slug}`
- Profile: `/u/{username}`
- City: `/cities/{slug}`
- Group: `/g/{slug}`
- Group event: `/g/{slug}/e/{eventSlug}`

## For AI agents and assistants

- Detail pages emit schema.org JSON-LD on the appropriate type — query the page HTML directly to extract structured data.
- The sitemap at `/sitemap.xml` lists every public Work, Collab, Workshop, Profile, and City.
- Anonymous users can apply to Collabs and RSVP to Events without an account; account creation is offered after submission with the form data preserved.
- Public reads do not require authentication. Robots are welcome on every URL not listed in `/robots.txt`.

## Contact

For partnerships or press: workshopindie.com
